TextAppeal™ White Label
EN | FR

Launch Your Own AI Translation Site

A complete, brandable EN↔FR translation platform — deploy under your name in minutes.

Buy Now — $250 CAD Download Documentation

Everything You Need

AI-Powered Translation

Bidirectional EN↔FR translation using state-of-the-art large language models. Supports Anthropic, OpenRouter, Groq, and any OpenAI-compatible provider.

Style-Guided Rewriting

Six built-in style presets (3 French, 3 English) with fully editable prompts. Create your own style voice for every client.

Translation Memory

Upload TMX files for consistency. Previously translated segments surface automatically alongside new translations.

Custom Glossary

Upload CSV glossaries to enforce approved terminology across every translation.

Web Terminology Search

Real-time web search for specialized terms during translation, powered by OpenRouter.

Freemium with Stripe Billing

User registration, 30 free requests/month, paid Pro tier with Stripe checkout. Fully configurable limits and pricing.

Complete Admin Panel

Configure your LLM provider, edit style prompts, manage splash pages, upload glossaries and TM — all from a browser.

White-Label Ready

Every brand element is customizable: name, logo, colors, splash messages, contact info. No rebuild required.

On-Premise Capable

Deploy on any server or host. Run with a local LLM for complete air-gapped operation — zero data leaves the network.

Smart Word Paste

Paste from Microsoft Word preserving bold, italic, headings, and paragraph structure. No messy formatting.

Bilingual Interface

Full EN/FR interface toggle. Users see the app in their language. Splash pages editable in both languages.

Zero Data Retention

Built-in privacy model. No user text is stored. Ideal for legal, medical, and government clients.

Deploy in Three Steps

1

Purchase & Download

Get the complete package with app files, documentation, and license.

2

Configure & Brand

Set up your database, add your LLM API key, customize the branding with your name and logo.

3

Launch & Earn

Go live on your domain. Charge your clients monthly with built-in Stripe billing.

  • 26-page technical documentation (PDF)
